title: Uranos
description: This mod integrates Hephaestus and Origins Classes by allowing the Blacksmith class to enhance Hephaestus weapons with small buffs. It was created for the Sky Journey modpack and is still in development.
body:
This Mod combines [Hephaestus](https://modrinth.com/mod/hephaestus) and [Origins: Classes](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-classes). The Blacksmith-Class now modifies Hephaestus (TinkersConstruct) Weapons and buffs them slightly.

Currently, only [Origins: Classes](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-classes) is required, since the [Hephaestus](https://modrinth.com/mod/hephaestus) mod is already integrated into Uranos.
I’m currently working on a version that will require both mods, as this will make the mod more compatible with future [Hephaestus](https://modrinth.com/mod/hephaestus) updates.

This Fork was created for the [SkyJourney](https://github.com/xedron-Studios/MC-Modpack-SkyJourney/) Modpack and is still in developement.
